data.title: Rithm Property Trust Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Rithm Property Trust Inc. released its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a GAAP comprehensive loss of $(3.2) million, equivalent to $(0.42) per diluted common share. Earnings available for distribution were $(0.3) million or $(0.04) per diluted common share. A common dividend of $2.8 million, or $0.36 per common share, was paid out. The book value per common share stood at $30.83 during this quarter.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Files Preliminary Proxy Statement in Connection with 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Shareholders are being urged to cast their vote in favor of Genco's highly experienced and qualified board members. The board has a strong track record of delivering exceptional returns and creating value for shareholders. It is crucial that shareholders support this proven team for continued success.

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 8, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Princeton, NJ, disclosed that they will be sharing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 8, 2026. The announcement, made on April 24, 2026, stated that the information will be made public before the market opens. ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., also known as ANI, is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ANIP.
